Looking at the current frame image, I can see that the bottom panels have swapped colors. The left panel is now gray (with a yellow object) and the right panel is now blue (with a yellow object). This is the same state as before when I clicked on the yellow object in the gray panel.
So clicking on the gray panel's background also swaps the panels. This is similar to clicking on the yellow object in the gray panel.
Now I'm at node 27. Let me check the neighbors of node 27 to see what actions are available.

- MOUSE(row=58, col=8) -> node 11
But the frontier shows that node 27 has untried MOUSE actions. So there are other MOUSE actions from node 27 that lead to unexplored states.
